//--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
// This is a WinOLS "MapProperties->Formulas" file.
// Do not edit while it's inside "c:\program files". Copy it to your own folder first!
//--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
// You can use it to define the values for the formula combobox drop-down.
//--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Format:
//   My formula 1
//   My formula 2
//
//   // My optional comment (not shown in the drop-down)
//   My formula 3 // My optional comment (not shown in the drop-down)
//--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Start editing here:
My formula 1
My formula 2

// My optional comment (not shown in the drop-down)
My formula 3 // My optional comment (not shown in the drop-down)
